title: FEMUR Host Map Record
description: Schema for a single host map record in the host_map JSONL output. Maps Discover host IDs to Falcon Agent IDs (AIDs). Each line in host_map.jsonl conforms to this schema.

_host_map_id.description: Discover-internal host identifier (composite key used by the Discover API).

aid.description: Falcon Agent ID (device_id). The primary key used across all datasets.
